name: Chicken Picante Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast, no skin, no bone, R-T-C, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken and kielbasa into bite-sized pieces.
2. Add onions, peppers, celery, potatoes, picante sauce, and broth to a large pot.
3. Cook for 1 to 1½ hours, or pressure cook the meat for 10 minutes first, then add all ingredients and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
